steps.title: Find the slope from the two points
Test each choice
steps.content:
Check which equation gives $f(4)=170$ and $f(10)=590$:
  • A) $f(x)=170x-590$: $f(4)=680-590=90 e 170$. Eliminate.
  • B) $f(x)=59x$: $f(4)=236 e 170$. Eliminate.
  • C) $f(x)=70x-10x=60x$: $f(4)=240 e 170$. Eliminate.
  • D) $f(x)=70x-110$: $f(4)=280-110=170$ ✓ and $f(10)=700-110=590$ ✓.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
